job_description: Deputy Manager - HR : Babuland Limited Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Babuland Limited Deputy Manager - HR Application Deadline : 05 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 01 Location: Dhaka (Banani) Salary: Negotiable Published: 05 Feb 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Passionate about people and recruitment. Ability to maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information. Familiarity with MS Office, Excel, PowerPoint, and HRIS software. Knowledge of Labor Law as well as other applicable rules & regulations. Strong oral and written communication skills in both Bengali & English. Proven Experience in HR roles with advanced HR software systems. Responsibilities & Context Managing the talent management process, including recruitment, selection, onboarding, determining hiring processes for new hires, and creating employment offers and packages for successful candidates. Supervise the monthly payroll process, ensuring accurate calculation of wages, overtime and deductions. Maintain management guidelines by preparing, updating, and recommending human-resources policies and procedures. Develop and implement advanced performance evaluation methods and appraisal systems. Stay current with HR technology trends and recommend new tools and systems. Analyze HR data to inform strategic decision-making and improve HR processes. Utilize advanced Excel skills for data analysis, reporting, and visualization. Ensure compliance with HR regulations and best practices. Manage disciplinary procedures, including issuing Show Cause notices, conducting domestic inquiries, and handling grievances in accordance with legal requirements. Foster a culture of continuous improvement and professional development within the HR team. Managing employee compensation and benefits programs, including salary reviews and bonuses. Collaborate with senior management to align HR strategies with organizational goals. Developing and implementing employee retention and employee engagement programs to increase employee retention. Skills & Expertise Conflict Resolution Data analysis and presentation HR Software Performance Evaluation Staffing Suggested by Human Resource Management Humanitarian emergency assistance programms Compensation & Other Benefits Fully Subsidized Lunch Conveyance for job-related movement Mobile allowance Provident Fund Permanent employee festival bonus Weekly 2 days holiday Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka (Banani) Company Information Babuland Limited Follow Address: Awal Center, 34 Kemal Ataturk Avenue, Banani C/A, Dhaka-1213, Bangladesh. Meat Quality Control (QC) Officer : Assurance Farm OPC Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Assurance Farm OPC Meat Quality Control (QC) Officer Application Deadline : 12 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Gazipur (Sreepur) Salary: Negotiable Published: 18 Feb 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. To access Application Insights Get Bdjobs Pro Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Prior experience in meat processing, food industry, or retail meat operations will be preferred. Responsible, sincere, and hardworking. Ability to work in a team environment. Willingness to work in both factory and outlet environments. Responsibilities & Context Ensure the quality, freshness, and hygiene standards of meat products. Monitor quality control during slaughtering and meat processing operations. Maintain proper temperature control, storage, and cold chain management. Ensure compliance with food safety and sanitation guidelines. Inspect raw materials and finished products regularly. Prepare daily QC reports and maintain proper documentation. Ensure product quality from processing unit to retail outlets. Conduct regular inspections of meat display, storage temperature, and hygiene conditions at outlets. Provide guidance and training to outlet staff on quality and hygiene standards. Investigate and resolve customer complaints related to product quality. Compensation & Other Benefits as per company policy. Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Special Educator : Bloomingbud Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Bloomingbud Special Educator Application Deadline : 08 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 4 Age: 24 to 35 years Location: Dhaka (Bosila, Mohammadpu... Dhaka (Bosila, Mohammadpur) Salary: Tk. 12000 - 24000 (Monthly) Published: 26 Feb 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 24 to 35 years Experience: 2–3 years preferred (Fresh graduates with strong internship experience are encouraged to apply) Experience in therapy centers, schools, or child development setups is preferred Experience in IEP, classroom readiness & early intervention preferred Strong classroom management Excellent communication & creativity Compassion & patience Ability to work in a multidisciplinary environment Responsibilities & Context We are looking for a compassionate, structured, and Special child-focused Special Educator who can guide children through personalized learning journeys. The ideal candidate will work one-on-one or in small groups, creating individualized education plans (IEPs) that turn small daily wins into meaningful long-term progress. Key Responsibilities Assess each child’s learning style, behavior patterns, and academic needs Develop and implement individualized education plans (IEPs) based on strengths and growth areas Conduct structured 1:1 and small-group sessions focused on: Attention & concentration Behavior management Executive functioning & study skills Social skills & emotional regulation Apply evidence-based strategies such as visual schedules, multi-sensory learning, structured teaching, task breakdown, and positive reinforcement Track measurable progress through session notes and reports Collaborate closely with Occupational Therapists, Speech Therapists, and Child Psychologists to ensure unified goals Guide parents with practical home strategies and structured routines Create a safe, motivating, and growth-focused learning environment Skills & Expertise special education Teamwork Suggested by Education Training & Development Compensation & Other Benefits Performance bonus Festival Bonus: 2 Salary Review: Yearly You will shape young minds, support academic readiness, and help children overcome learning challenges through structured, research-based approaches.
Supportive, innovation-driven team environment
Opportunity to work in a holistic child development ecosystem Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka (Bosila, Mohammadpur) Company Information Bloomingbud Follow Address: House No- 07, 2nd Floor, Block -C, Mohammadpur Future Town ( 40 feet Main Road) ,Basila, Mohammadpur, Dhaka-1207. job_title: Planning, Monitoring, Evaluation and Reporting (PMER) Officer
job_description: Planning, Monitoring, Evaluation and Reporting (PMER) Officer : The Bangladesh Red Crescent Society Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List The Bangladesh Red Crescent Society Planning, Monitoring, Evaluation and Reporting (PMER) Officer Application Deadline : 08 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Company Information Summary Vacancy: 1 Location: Dhaka Salary: Tk. 60000 (Monthly) Published: 02 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Experience Minimum 3–5 years of relevant experience in PMER/MEAL within health, humanitarian, or development programs. Proven experience in monitoring health programs, data analysis, and donor reporting. Experience working with Red Cross/Red Crescent Movement or NGOs is an asset. Required Competencies and Skills Strong analytical and report-writing skills. Proven ability to design indicators, tools, and monitoring frameworks. Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); knowledge of data visualization tools is an advantage. Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a multi-disciplinary team. Strong communication, coordination, and facilitation skills. Willingness to travel to field locations as required. Core Values and Principles Commitment to the Fundamental Principles of the Red Cross and Red Crescent Movement. Strong sense of integrity, accountability, and professionalism. Respect for diversity and cultural sensitivity. Age Limit: 45 years maximum (Age limit will be relaxed in case of potential candidates) Responsibilities & Context The Red Cross-Red Crescent Movement is the largest volunteer organization in the world. Bangladesh Red   Crescent Society (BDRCS), a national society of the Movement, constituted on 31 March 1973 by the President`s Order No. 26 of 1973 with retrospective effect from 16 December 1971, is the biggest humanitarian organization in the country. As an auxiliary to the government in terms of providing the humanitarian assistance, BDRCS has been working to prevent and alleviate human suffering through rendering humanitarian services in partnership with local authorities and communities across all the districts of Bangladesh through its 68 branches and dedicated network of volunteers, in line with the international humanitarian standards and adhering to the seven Fundamental Principles of the Red Cross Red Crescent Movement. BDRCS activities include Humanitarian Response, Climate Change Adaptation, Disaster Management, Health and Wellbeing, Capacity Building and Promoting Red Cross/ Red Crescent ideals and principles. Currently BDRCS is looking for a suitable Bangladeshi candidate for the following position: Project Name: Various projects under Health Department Job Nature: Contractual Duration of Contract: 1 year (with possibility of extension subject to satisfactory performance and availability of fund) Report

Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Age 25 to 45 years Only Male Responsibilities & Context Pathaan Air International একটি স্বনামধন্য ট্রাভেল ও ভিসা সার্ভিস প্রতিষ্ঠান। ওয়ার্ক পারমিট, ট্যুরিস্ট ভিসা, এয়ার টিকেটিং ও ওভারসিজ এমপ্লয়মেন্ট সংক্রান্ত আর্থিক লেনদেন সঠিকভাবে পরিচালনার জন্য একজন দায়িত্বশীল ও অভিজ্ঞ Accounts Officer নিয়োগ দেওয়া হবে। প্রার্থীকে দৈনন্দিন হিসাবরক্ষণ, ব্যাংকিং কার্যক্রম ও আর্থিক রিপোর্টিংয়ে দক্ষ হতে হবে। Job Responsibilities: দৈনন্দিন আয়-ব্যয়ের হিসাব সংরক্ষণ ও আপডেট রাখা ক্যাশ বুক, ব্যাংক বুক ও লেজার মেইনটেইন করা ভাউচার প্রস্তুত, যাচাই ও সংরক্ষণ ব্যাংক রিকনসিলিয়েশন স্টেটমেন্ট প্রস্তুত করা ক্লায়েন্ট ও ভেন্ডর পেমেন্ট প্রসেসিং ও ফলোআপ ভিসা প্রসেসিং ফি, টিকেটিং ও সার্ভিস চার্জের হিসাব নির্ভুলভাবে সংরক্ষণ মাসিক/ত্রৈমাসিক আর্থিক রিপোর্ট প্রস্তুত করা ম্যানেজমেন্টকে নিয়মিত আর্থিক আপডেট প্রদান ভ্যাট/ট্যাক্স সংক্রান্ত প্রাথমিক কাগজপত্র প্রস্তুত রাখা অডিট কার্যক্রমে সহায়তা করা প্রয়োজন অনুযায়ী প্রশাসনিক কাজে সহযোগিতা করা Skills & Expertise Suggested by Accounting Data Entry Accounts and Finance Bank Reconciliation Compensation & Other Benefits T/A,Provident fund,Tour allowance,Mobile bill,Over time allowance,Performance bonus,Profit share,Gratuity Lunch Facilities: Full Subsidize Salary Review: Yearly Festival Bonus: 2 Workplace Work at office Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. job_description: প্রভাষক : National Public College & Institute of Higher Education Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List National Public College & Institute of Higher Education প্রভাষক Application Deadline : 31 Mar 2026 Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Company Information Summary Vacancy: -- Location: Dhaka (Uttara) Salary: Negotiable Published: 02 Mar 2026 Application Insights View Requirements Education Responsibilities & Context শিক্ষার মানোন্নয়ন ও যোগ্য শিক্ষকমণ্ডলী গঠনের লক্ষ্যে ন্যাশনাল পাবলিক স্কুল এন্ড কলেজ-এ নিম্নোক্ত বিষয়ে ঢাকা শিক্ষা বোর্ড ও সরকারী বিধিমোতাবেক নিম্মোক্ত পদে নিয়োগ দেওয়া হবে। আগ্রহী ও যোগ্য প্রার্থীদের নিকট হতে আবেদনপত্র আহ্বান করা যাচ্ছে। বিষয়সমূহ: বাংলা, ইংরেজি, আইসিটি, গণিত, পদার্থবিজ্ঞান, রসায়ন, জীববিজ্ঞান, হিসাববিজ্ঞান, ফিন্যান্স ও ব্যাংকিং, ব্যবস্থাপনা, মার্কেটিং, কৃষি শিক্ষা, অর্থনীতি, পৌরনীতি, সমাজকর্ম, সমাজ কল্যাণ, ইসলামের ইতিহাস, ইসলাম শিক্ষা পদের সংখ্যা: প্রতিটি বিষয়ে ২ (দুই) জন করে Skills & Expertise Suggested by Classroom management Teaching/ Training Teaching Employment Status Full Time Job Location Dhaka (Uttara) Apply Procedure Hard Copy আগ্রহী প্রার্থীদের নিম্নোক্ত কাগজপত্র সংযুক্ত করে আগামী ৩১/০৩/২০২৬ ইং তারিখের মধ্যে অধ্যক্ষ ন্যাশনাল পাবলিক স্কুল এন্ড কলেজ, বাড়ি # ১৮, রোড # ১৬, সেক্টর # ০৪, উত্তরা, ঢাকা-১২৩০-এর বরাবর পূর্ণাঙ্গ জীবনবৃত্তান্ত (CV), সকল শিক্ষাগত যোগ্যতা ও অভিজ্ঞতার সনদের সত্যায়িত কপি, জাতীয় পরিচয়পত্রের ফটোকপি, ২ কপি পাসপোর্ট সাইজ ছবি এবং আবেদনের ক্ষেত্রে ৩০০/- (তিনশত) টাকার অফেরতযোগ্য ব্যাংক ড্রাফট/পে-অর্ডারসহ আবেদন করতে হবে। বেতন আলোচনা সাপেক্ষে। প্রয়োজনে: ০১৬১১২৩৪৬০৬ Company Information National Public College & Institute of Higher Education Follow Address: House-18, Road-16, Sector-4 Uttara Dhaka Report this Job / Company (রিপোর্ট) রিপোর্ট এই চাকরির জন্য বিজ্ঞাপনদাতা ব্যাক্তি/প্রতিষ্ঠান আপনার কাছ থেকে কোন অর্থ চাইলে কিংবা নিয়োগ প্রক্রিয়া চলাকালীন কোন প্রকার হয়রানিমূলক (শারীরিক/মানসিক) আচরণ করলে অতিসত্ত্বর আমাদেরকে জানান অথবা জবটি রিপোর্ট করুন। চাকরি পাওয়ার জন্য কোন ব্যাক্তি/প্রতিষ্ঠানকে অর্থ প্রদান করবেন না। চাকরিকালীন কোন প্রকার হয়রানির (শারীরিক/মানসিক) সম্ভাবনা থাকলে সেখানে জয়েন করবেন না। কোন প্রকার অর্থ লেনদেন বা নিয়োগদাতা কর্তৃক হয়রানির দায়িত্ব বিডিজবস বহন করবে না। 09638666444 , 01897627858 complain@bdjobs.com ⏸ Internal auditor certificate course on ISO 14001:2015 Enviro... 3000 BDT Joyshree Das Register Now Internal Auditor certificate course on ISO 9001:2015 4000 BDT Joyshree Das Register Now Project Cycle Management (PCM) for the NGO Professionals 4500 BDT Tareq Ahmed Register Now Lean Six Sigma-Yellow Belt 3500 BDT Engr. Computer Engineer : PiVOTLeadership Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List PiVOTLeadership Computer Engineer Application Deadline : 12 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Company Information Summary Vacancy: 2 Location: Dhaka Salary: Negotiable Published: 02 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Additional Requirements Experience: It is preferable to have experience in a technical role (e.g., technical support, systems administration, network engineering, software development etc.). Candidate without experience will be considered if they demonstrate outstanding capabilities. Technical Skills: Strong knowledge of operating systems, networking, and hardware/software troubleshooting. Soft Skills: Excellent problem-solving abilities, strong communication skills, and the ability to work well independently and as part of a team. Personality : Self-driven, results-orientated with a positive outlook A natural forward planner who critically assesses own performance Reliable, tolerant, and determined Keen for new experience, responsibility, and accountability Flexible, enthusiastic and enjoy being part of a team Display confidence by challenging what we do with a view to improving our processes Ability to take ownership of workload and to be able to deliver within agreed timescales Ability to multitask, work well under pressure and priorities Have an eye for detail and the confidence to challenge anything that does not look right Responsibilities & Context Technical Support: Diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve hardware/software issues promptly. System Maintenance: Perform routine maintenance on systems to ensure optimal performance and prevent downtime. Installation & Configuration: Install, configure, and test systems and applications as required. Collaboration: Work closely with development, project, and operations teams to identify and implement technology solutions. Documentation: Create and maintain technical documentation for systems, procedures, and processes. Project Assistance: Support technology-related projects, providing expertise on technical implementation and ensuring projects meet deadlines. Quality Assurance: Test and validate new technologies and updates before implementation. Continuous Improvement: Stay updated with emerging technologies and best practices; propose improvements to optimize performance and efficiency. Skills & Expertise Engineering Networking Programming Strong analytical and problemsolving skills.
